content: [Backend-Models] Add SUPER_ADMIN role, update Franchise model with approval_status fields
[Backend-Routes] Create routes_staff.py and routes_superadmin.py with all endpoints
[Backend-Schema] Update schemas for staff and franchise operations
[Backend-Integration] Update routes.py, dependencies.py, and auth to register new routers
[Frontend-Routes] Add /superadmin/* routes and staff management to App.tsx
[Frontend-Pages] Create superadmin pages (Dashboard, FranchiseManagement, AllStaff) and franchisee StaffManagement
[Frontend-Components] Create superadmin layout, sidebar, and reusable StaffForm/FranchiseCard components
[Testing & Commit] Test superadmin login, franchise CRUD, staff management isolation, and commit all changes
